ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity this metadata is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_resources" (
  "shared_resource_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shared resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the shared resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., library, service) */,
  "resource_details" TEXT /* Details or description of the resource */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the shared resource */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the shared resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shared resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shared resource was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the shared resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity this version relates to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the activity */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Changelog detailing changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Developer, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Assigned role ID from user_roles table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the activity */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
